description: You can execute these commands from the Cortex XSOAR CLI, as part of an automation, or in a playbook. After you successfully execute a command, a DBot message appears in the War Room with the command details.
name: file

outputs.description: MD5 hash of the file (if supplied). File.SHA1 SHA1 hash of the file (if supplied).
outputs.name: File.MD5

outputs.description: MD5 hash of the file (if supplied). File.TrustLevel File lowest trust level.
outputs.name: File.SHA256

outputs.description: Vendor of the file lowest trust level. DBotScore.Score Vendor used to calculate the score.
outputs.name: File.Vendor

outputs.description: The actual score. DBotScore.Type Indicator type.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor
